caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing glasses, a dark blue t-shirt, a gold chain, and silver headphones, is seated in front of a framed blue and white background. The background features the number "20" and small dolphin logos. To the left, colorful blurred lights are visible. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks or reacts. Initially, he has his mouth open in a smile, showing his teeth. He then closes his mouth and slightly purses his lips. Next, he opens his mouth wider with his eyes partially closed, and finally, he opens his mouth fully in an expressive shout or gasp, with his eyes open. He remains in the same position throughout, facing slightly to the left of the camera, while a black microphone is partially visible at the bottom of the scene.
